title.en: As soon as these gods entered the small world o...

content.en:
Since it is a small world of trials, it can't be too big, otherwise they will hide one by one, and I don't know how long it will take to end this round of competition.

Of course, more than 70,000 gods will be distributed almost randomly throughout the small world, and there will be no pattern to speak of.

As soon as these gods entered the small world of trials, the battle began.

And some of the seven-star god generals used concealment methods after entering the small world of trials, trying to evade some powerful nine-star god generals.

These seven-star god generals naturally know that they are not the opponents of the nine-star god generals, and they just want to fight against other seven-star god generals, if they are lucky enough to defeat ten seven-star god generals, they can leave the trial small world in advance.

But not every seven-star god general has such powerful means, and most of them have been discovered by other eight-star god generals and nine-star god generals.

Trials are small spaces.

Xiao Yue was looking for other generals, but before she could make a move against other generals, a general found her.

Rumble!!!!

An eight-star god general was wrapped in a cold momentum and killed Xiao Yue.

He didn't know Xiao Yue, although Xiao Yue was a god general at the top of the god general list, but because Xiao Yue was too low-key, she almost didn't have an accident, and she never appeared in public, so many god generals didn't know what Xiao Yue looked like at all.

This has led to many gods who have heard of Xiao Yue, but do not know Xiao Yue.

"Look for death!"

Xiao Yue made a move, and she burst out with a terrifying aura that had been restrained.

"No!"

The eight-star god constricted his pupils sharply, terrified to the extreme.

He didn't expect that a god general he casually found turned out to be such a powerful god general, which was also too unlucky.

Xiao Yue, as Ye Tian's wife, rarely makes a move, but it does not mean that she is merciful and soft-hearted, so she will not show mercy to her subordinates.

Therefore, Xiao Yue's blow is a killer move!

The eight-star god general wanted to admit defeat, but Xiao Yue's speed was too fast, and a sword stabbed him, and a cold light appeared.

Tear and pull!

The cold light of the sword tore apart the body of the eight-star god general, directly slashing it into a blood mist.

An eight-star god general, fallen!

When this eight-star god general fell, a big force came with a roar, but there was no trouble, in such a game, let alone the fall of an eight-star god general, even if it was the fall of a nine-star god general, he did not dare to make trouble, otherwise he would be targeted by all the Dao Ancestor incarnations, and it would not be just some god generals who died.

As time passed, a famous god would fall into Xiao Yue's hands, and soon Xiao Yue had accumulated ten tokens.

After getting ten tokens, Xiao Yue will no longer continue to kill, after all, obtaining ten tokens will definitely qualify for the next round, and there is no need to kill too many people.

What's more, Xiao Yue is not a person to kill.

In addition to Xiao Yue, some of the Nine-Star Divine Generals also obtained ten tokens one by one and came out of the small world of trials.

As for those weak seven-star god generals, a very small number of luck were hidden very deeply, no one found them, but most of them were found, and a considerable number of them encountered powerful eight- or nine-star god generals, and they didn't even have a chance to admit defeat at all, and they were directly killed in seconds.

There are still some who admit defeat in time, so they are eliminated in advance, although they can't advance to the next round, but they have a chance to live, but it is difficult to show themselves, and they can't gain fame and the favor of Dao Ancestors.

But the most unlucky thing was that some of the early nine-star god generals met some of the more demonic nine-star peak god generals, and were killed by the nine-star peak god generals.

And there will be far more than one or two fallen Nine Star Early Stage Gods, and these gods will be the real wrongs.

After all, even if the Nine-Star Early Stage Divine General could not obtain the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool, it was enough to shine in such a competition, but he never expected that the promising Nine-Star Divine General would fall in such a competition.

Half a day passed, and as a large number of gods would fall or be eliminated, the number gradually decreased to 10,000.

Suddenly.

The Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor reappeared, and the sound entered the small space of the trial.

"The first round of assessment is over!"

As these words fell, some of the seven-star god generals who were lucky enough to survive, and even the eight-star god generals breathed a sigh of relief.

The happiest were some of the gods who were about to fall and die, they were in the middle of the battle, they were about to be killed, but they didn't expect the first round to be over, so they survived.

The first round was over, and no one dared to shoot anymore.

Swish!!!

A famous god will come out of the small world of trials and immediately stand on a field.

A whole 10,000 people stood here, facing the eyes of countless strong people.

"Ten days to recover, and ten days later for the second round!"

Wheel Wind Daozu said.

Immediately, some seriously injured gods took out various healing pills, and even took out the time formation disk to speed up the time healing for themselves, after all, if the injury is too serious, even if there are good healing treasures, they will not be able to completely recover within ten days.

Some of the gods who were not injured silently meditated on the news and adjusted their state.

In the blink of an eye, ten days have passed.

The second round has begun!

This round of the game is not as cruel as the first round, the first round of the game is more like screening players, after all, more than 70,000 gods are indeed too many, and it takes a long time to compete one by one, so most of the gods will be eliminated, and only 10,000 gods will continue to play, so it is easier to arrange.

The second round is divided into ten groups, each with 1,000 people, and only 10 people in each group can advance to the next round.

It is stipulated that each person in each group must go through 100 battles, and the ten people with the best final record will advance.

Of course, the loser can have a chance to challenge, and the failure to challenge will be eliminated completely.

This kind of single-player battle game, the chance of falling is not very large, after all, if the real power gap is too big, you can directly admit defeat, if the strength gap is not big, there is also time to admit defeat.

It's scary to be afraid that there is a god who will hide his strength, and it will be too late for the other party to admit defeat.

"No. 78 in the third group!"

Ye Tian read Xiao Yue's number plate.

The distribution of the ten groups is relatively reasonable, almost dividing the nine-star peak god generals into one group after another, and there will be no situation where the strong ones almost appear in one group.

This is enough to ensure that every strong person can advance to the third round, but this is not a certainty, after all, in case which nine-star peak god will fall in the middle of the competition, this situation is not uncommon.

Ye Tian was very confident in Xiao Yue's strength, so he would not worry.

Soon, the second round officially began.

Huge competition rings appeared, and many Dao Ancestor incarnations arranged prohibitions and solidified the rings, which were enough to support the gods to fight in the ring.

Moreover, the space expansion formation is arranged in the ring, so that the internal space of each ring is very huge, although it is not as large as a small world, but it will not make the gods feel shrinking.

Pair after pair of gods will enter the ring, and the battle begins.

Almost every god will take out all their strength and hole cards, in the case of insufficient strength, no god will dare to hide, otherwise the hole cards are useless, I am afraid that they will be defeated or killed.

After a while, it was Xiao Yue's turn for the third group to appear!
